body.purpose: Primary UI text. Canvas hints, inspector content, button labels.

label.purpose: Section headers, tray labels, group headers. Uppercase with tracking.

mono.purpose: Input text, log lines, coordinates, variable values, JSON.

title.purpose: Section headers, node titles, inspector identity.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Cards, toolbar, sidebar containers. Ambient minimum separation.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Nodes on canvas, dropdown menus, corner-stack panels. Structural lift.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Context menus, layout menus, variable picker popovers. Modal floating layer.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, selection). Ease-out-quart.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Button hovers, border changes, quick micro-interactions.

motion.name: transition-medium
motion.purpose: Panel collapse/expand, tab switches, view transitions.

motion.name: wf-run-pulse
motion.purpose: Running node amber pulse. Box-shadow oscillation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button. Used for save, run, and commit actions. Stable Blue with white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11.5px; border: 1px solid #2f6fed; background: #2f6fed; color: #fff; padding: 0 11px; cursor: pointer; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background .15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2559c7; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f6fed; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(.97); }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Secondary actions, toolbar controls. Panel background with dim text and subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11.5px; border: 1px solid #e4e7ec; background: #fff; color: #5a6573; padding: 0 11px; cursor: pointer; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background .15s, color .15s, border-color .15s; } .ds-btn-default:hover { background: #f3f5f9; color: #19222e; border-color: #dde2e8; } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f6fed; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Success Button
components.description: Run button, commit actions. Green fill with subtle green shadow for presence.
components.html:
<button class="ds-btn-success">
  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>
  Run
</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; border: 1px solid #1f9254; background: #1f9254; color: #fff; padding: 0 11px; cursor: pointer; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,146,84,.3); transition: background .15s; } .ds-btn-success:hover { background: #1b8049; } .ds-btn-success:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f6fed; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-success svg { stroke: currentColor; fill: none; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Delete, clear, destructive actions. Red tint background with red text.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11.5px; border: 1px solid #eecdca; background: #fcefee; color: #bb3a33; padding: 0 11px; cursor: pointer; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background .15s; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #fae2e0; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f6fed; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square toolbar button with icon only. Label lives in the title attribute.
components.html:
<button class="ds-btn-icon" title="Save">
  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M19 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11l5 5v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"/><polyline points="17 21 17 13 7 13 7 21"/><polyline points="7 3 7 8 15 8"/></svg>
</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e4e7ec; background: #fff; color: #5a6573; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: background .15s, color .15s, border-color .15s; } .ds-btn-icon:hover { background: #f3f5f9; color: #19222e; border-color: #dde2e8; } .ds-btn-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f6fed; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-icon svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; display: block; stroke: currentColor; fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text/number input. Mono font, panel background, subtle border.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", "Cascadia Code", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 11.5px; background: #fff; color: #19222e; border: 1px solid #dde2e8; border-radius: 7px; padding: 5px 8px; width: 200px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9aa3ae; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2f6fed; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #d6e4f5; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: The primary container surface. White panel with subtle shadow and border.
components.html:
Section Title
Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e7ec; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,30,45,.06); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f3f6; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .05em; color: #5a6573; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #19222e; }

components.name: Context Menu
components.description: Right-click context menu. Floating panel with strong shadow.
components.css: .ds-ctxmenu { position: fixed; z-index: 50; min-width: 140px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dde2e8; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.16); padding: 4px; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-ctx-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 7px 10px; font-size: 12px; color: #19222e; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; border: none; background: none; font-family: inherit; text-align: left; } .ds-ctx-item:hover { background: #eef5ff; color: #2f6fed; } .ds-ctx-ico { display: flex; align-items: center; color: #9aa3ae; } .ds-ctx-item:hover .ds-ctx-ico { color: #2f6fed; } .ds-ctx-ico svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; display: block; stroke: currentColor; fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

components.name: Chip / Draggable Node Palette Item
components.description: A draggable node from the palette. Grab handle with category-colored icon.
components.html: Tap
components.css: .ds-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 8px; border: 1px solid #dde2e8; border-radius: 7px; background: #fff; cursor: grab; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #41505f; transition: border-color .1s, background .1s, box-shadow .1s; user-select: none; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #2f6fed; background: #eef5ff; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(47,111,237,.1); } .ds-chip:active { cursor: grabbing; } .ds-chip-ico { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 14px; height: 14px; color: #6f9be8; } .ds-chip-ico svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; display: block; stroke: currentColor; fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

components.name: Log Entry
components.description: A single log line in the collapsible log panel. Timestamp + tag + message.
components.html:
14:32:01 INF Workflow started: My Workflow
14:32:03 OK Tap completed
14:32:05 ERR Template match failed: threshold too low
components.css: .ds-log-line { display: flex; gap: 7px; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", "Cascadia Code", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.75; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-log-ts { color: #b3bbc4; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-log-tag { font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-log-msg { color: #41505f; white-space: normal; } .ds-log-info { color: #5b86c9; } .ds-log-success { color: #1f9d57; } .ds-log-error { color: #d6483f; } .ds-log-warning { color: #c08a1e; }

narrative.overview:
Workflow2k is a precision tool. Every visual element exists to serve the user's task — composing, debugging, and executing Android automation workflows. The design system treats the interface like a calibrated instrument: surfaces are clean and cool, accents are deliberate and restrained, and nothing decorative competes with the graph.

The palette is cool-neutral with a single stable blue accent. IBM Plex Sans carries the UI; IBM Plex Mono holds code, coordinates, and data. Components are tactile and confident — buttons feel like they commit action, nodes feel like they're part of a live circuit. The graph canvas is the center; everything else recedes until needed.

This system explicitly rejects the design-tool aesthetic: no pastels, no glassmorphism, no soft-focus blur. It's not a dashboard, not a consumer app, and not a terminal-first tool. It's a developer's instrument — precise, efficient, and capable.
keyCharacteristics: Cool-neutral light palette with a single blue accent
IBM Plex Sans for UI, IBM Plex Mono for code and data
Tactile buttons and confident cards — nothing feels tentative
The graph is the center; chrome recedes until needed
Semantic color roles for run state (green trail, red failure, amber live)

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The Stable Blue is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — it draws the eye to the one thing that matters: the current action, the selected node, the focus ring. When everything is blue, nothing is.

rules.name: The Cool-Neutral Floor Rule
rules.body: The background is always cool-grey (#eef0f3), never warm (cream/sand/beige/parchment). Warmth is carried by the amber/orange semantic colors (run-live, warn, branch-false), not by the structural palette.

rules.name: The Semantic-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Ok green, warn amber, and error red appear only when they carry meaning (save succeeded, validation warning, action failed). They are never used as decorative flourishes. A button is green only when it commits; it's red only when it destroys.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono. No third family. The proportional/monospace contrast is sufficient; adding a serif or display face dilutes the tool's precision.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The uppercase label style is used only when the text actually labels a control or section. It never appears as a decorative kicker above content that doesn't need labeling.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to structure (cards need separation from bg, nodes need lift from canvas) or state (a context menu is floating). No decorative shadow.

rules.name: The Z-Index Scale Rule
rules.body: No arbitrary z-index values. The scale is: node (2), selection box (1), node hover (6), menu (50), toast (60). Every z-index in the CSS maps to one of these semantic layers.

dos: Do use the Stable Blue accent sparingly — it should appear on ≤10% of any screen. Primary buttons, selected states, focus rings only.
Do use semantic colors (ok green, warn amber, err red) only when they carry meaning — never as decoration.
Do keep the graph canvas as the visual center. The toolbar, sidebar, and inspector are chrome — they recede until needed.
Do use the uppercase label style only when the text actually labels a control or section. Never as a decorative kicker.
Do maintain 4.5:1 contrast for all body text against its background.
Do use the shadow scale by role: sm for cards, md for nodes/menus, lg for floating panels.
Do keep the background cool-grey (#eef0f3). Warmth comes from semantic amber/orange.
Do use IBM Plex Sans for UI, IBM Plex Mono for code/data. No third family.
donts: Don't use the design-tool aesthetic: no pastels, no glassmorphism, no soft-focus blur, no frosted glass.
Don't make the interface dark-by-default or dashboard-like. No wall-of-metrics, no chart-heavy panels.
Don't add playful or consumer-app elements: no illustrations, no gamification, no whimsy.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Use a single solid color.
Don't use arbitrary z-index values. Map to the semantic scale.
Don't warm-tint the background. No cream, sand, beige, parchment, or ivory.
Don't animate without a reduced-motion fallback.
Don't introduce a second accent color. The Stable Blue is the only accent.
